component.name: On-Screen Keyboard & Mouse-Click Visualizer — Always-On-Top Overlay for Linux/Wayland (COSMIC, sway, Hyprland, KDE Plasma, wlroots)
component.summary: Always-on-top keyboard and mouse-click overlay for Wayland screencasts

description.p: Always-on-top overlay that shows the keys you press and the mouse buttons you click, for screencasts, tutorials and streams. Built natively for Wayland with GTK4 and gtk4-layer-shell (COSMIC, sway, Hyprland, KDE Plasma, wlroots); it reads input via libinput and translates keys with xkbcommon.
A screenkey / KeyCastr alternative for Linux/Wayland.
